name: research-paper-workflow
description: End-to-end research paper workflow for CS, AI, AI4Science papers — from idea to submission.

interface.shortDescription: End-to-end CS/AI research paper workflow from idea to submission.
interface.longDescription: A 14-stage research engineering skill for CS, AI, and AI4Science paper projects: idea optimization, idea review, literature search, related-work matrix, claim manifest, experiment design, experiment implementation, result engineering, result analysis, venue-aware writing, peer review, integrity audit, submission check, and rebuttal. Includes triple-check source verification, next-step navigation, Python utility scripts, and reusable templates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use research-paper-workflow to manage this paper project. Respect mode boundaries, source verification requirements, and next-step menu gates.
